svg.text: Codex reads Claude's session via chorus, detects the stall, continues the work
Modifying files, following spec, making steady progress...
Claude hits rate limit — session stalls
No crash, no error. Just silence. The agent stops producing output.
User → Codex: "Monitor Claude. If it stops, pick up where it left off."
One instruction. No script. No runbook. No shared task queue.
Codex reads Claude's session via chorus
Codex continues implementation from the exact stall point
No orchestrator. No message bus. Just read access to evidence.
The coordination wasn't designed. It was a side effect of visibility.
